portal_state.timeout_banner: Your application has timed out / signed out after inactivity messaging visible on IFS public pages

required: UK registered lead organisation can start the IFS application
At least one non-linked Swiss implementation partner applying through Innosuisse
At least one UK or Swiss research institute unless the Swiss applicant is an individual start-up, pre-market and less than 50 FTE
Project focus in Semiconductors, Life Sciences, or Engineering Biology
UK grant request no greater than GBP 450,000
Project starts 1 February 2027 and lasts 18 to 36 months

proposed_aureon_positioning.working_title: Aureon Evidence OS for cross-border AI assurance and semiconductor-enabled research workflows
proposed_aureon_positioning.theme_fit: Semiconductors / AI compute assurance only if a Swiss implementation partner and research institute validate the hardware or applied technology pathway
proposed_aureon_positioning.lead_status: R&A Consulting can start the IFS application as UK organisation, but should not submit without partner evidence

next_actions: Human operator signs into the IFS account or confirms account creation details.
Confirm the intended IFS account and organisation profile for R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd.
Provide or identify Swiss implementation partner evidence and research institute evidence.
Use existing IFS conversion partner pack text as draft material after the portal draft exists.
Do not submit final application until all partner, scope, cost, subsidy, and terms sections are complete and verified.
controls: No password, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, partner invitation, upload, email send, or final submission was attempted.
No plaintext secret was read or stored.
Browser automation could not attach to the in-app browser; public IFS page state was verified through official page readback.
